body:
Good morning, Alexandria Friends! Happy Thursday!

So, my fiancée brought home a new kitten yesterday. I will try and have photos up when she gets a little more comfortable. (Although, I guess I haven’t really shared pics of our other kitties. I guess that will need to be a thing soon.

I’m kinda in a very odd/off headspace today, which has me struggling a little. So I’m not entirely sure how much I’ll be around, but we’ll see how the day goes.

Love to you all, I hope you have a wonderful day, and I’ll see you when I’m around! 🖤🖤🖤
